productDisplayName: Peter England Men Formal Black Belt
description: A formal essential, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england perfects this traditional accessory's foray into  modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal trousers, formal shoes and crisp full-sleeved shirts.
